page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c40g1.10xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 40 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 155.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.88 GB of RAM per core. For hardware acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA T4 GPU based on the Turing architecture, which provides 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. This instance does not include local NVMe storage and relies on external storage options, while offering a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core or accelerated performance. Single-core CPU benchmarks, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, place the instance in the bottom 25%, indicating weaker single-threaded performance. However, multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth tests fall consistently within the average range. The integrated NVIDIA T4 GPU delivers strong performance in specific workloads, achieving top-tier results in prompt processing for small and medium LLM models, and strong performance in text generation for medium models.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the inclusion of a dedicated NVIDIA T4 GPU alongside a high vCPU count makes this instance a balanced option for workloads requiring hardware acceleration without the premium cost of higher-end GPUs. Since there is no local storage, it is best suited for workloads that can leverage network-attached storage. Recommended workloads include machine learning inference, small-to-medium LLM deployment, video transcoding, and general-purpose GPU-accelerated applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c40g1.10xlarge is an x86_64 GPU-accelerated server featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz and 155.0 GB of system memory. It is equipped with a single NVIDIA T4 GPU based on the Turing architecture, providing 16 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. While single-core CPU benchmarks place this server in the lower performance tier, its multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth are average. The hardware configuration excels in GPU-driven tasks, delivering top-tier performance in prompt processing for small and medium language models. This makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for machine learning inference, medium-scale LLM text generation, and GPU-accelerated compute tasks that do not require high-speed local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c40g1.10xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 40 Intel Xeon cores, 155 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM, optimized for machine learning inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c40g1.10xlarge features 40 Intel Xeon cores, 155 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for accelerated machine learning workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and an NVIDIA T4 GPU for efficient machine learning inference.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz
155.0 GB of system memory and 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of Turing-architecture VRAM
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage
Top-tier performance in prompt processing for small and medium LLMs
Well-suited for machine learning inference and GPU-accelerated compute
